title: UN OUTIL PRATIQUE POUR ÉVALUER L'EFFICACITÉ DES BARRIÈRES SANITAIRES EN ELEVAGE
description: A practical guide for using ELISA-based serological monitoring to assess the effectiveness of sanitary barriers in poultry production. It details sampling steps, ELISA test panels for common avian pathogens, and interpretation of seroprevalence results to recommend targeted biosecurity measures.
